title: [SBW] Drill, baby, drill!
description: Power your SuperbWarfare vehicles with real fuel.
body:
Drill, Baby, Drill! is a small, focused addon for SuperbWarfare that replaces electric vehicle charging with fuel-to-energy conversion.

- Config-based addon
Anything can be turned into fuel through config as well as balanced with specification of how much energy it provides.
 
- Supports fuels from other mods
Anything added by other mods can be used, as long as it is defined in the config.

- No new fuels added
The mod does not introduce its own fuels — it only converts existing ones into energy.

- Simple, lightweight integration
Minimal overhead, no tick-heavy logic, safe to add or remove from existing worlds.
